arts.ttl: ‘Marinaki$’ – Fans graffiti stadium to demand club is sold to Nottingham Forest owner
arts.sum: Fans of Brazilian club Vasco appear determined to get Nottingham Forest owner Evangelos Marinakis as their new owner, demanding that the club be sold to him. That’s according to O Dia, who report that Vasco fans have graffitied their stadium in support of the Nottingham Forest owner’s takeover bid. arts.ttl: Manchester United issue statement on Nottingham Forest game amid Storm Darragh weather concerns
arts.sum: Everton vs Liverpool in the Merseyside derby has already been postponed on Saturday

arts.ttl: Man United issue update on Nottingham Forest clash amid chaos caused by Storm Darragh after Everton vs Liverpool was CALLED OFF
arts.sum: The club issued a statement on the fixture, scheduled to kick-off at 5:30pm, after the last Merseyside derby at Goodison Park was called off.

arts.ttl: Man Utd drop Joshua Zirkzee team news hint ahead of Nottingham Forest as Ruben Amorim makes call
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim made half a dozen changes for the midweek defeat against Arsenal and could make more for the visit of Nottingham Forest to Old Trafford this weekend

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Forest to go ahead amid Storm Darragh
arts.sum: Manchester United's clash with Nottingham Forest in the Premier League at Old Trafford on Saturday will go ahead as the country's braces against Storm Darragh.

arts.ttl: Manchester United have just released official update on Nottingham Forest clash amid postponement concerns
Sir Alex Ferguson's brilliant message to Olympic hero Keely Hodgkinson sums him up
arts.sum: Keely Hodgkinson is among the frontrunners to be named the BBC Sports Personality of the Year and was given a heartfelt message by ex-Man Utd boss Sir Alex Ferguson after winning Olympic gold

arts.ttl: The chances of Manchester United vs Nottingham Forest being postponed as Storm Darragh report emerges
Man Utd fan Max Verstappen admits Liverpool soft spot and has 'sad' Ruben Amorim regret
arts.sum: F1 champion Max Verstappen admitted he is tempted by Virgil van Dijk's offer to visit Anfield despite his love for Manchester United, as he spoke to Mirror Sport at the Abu Dhabi Grand Prix

arts.ttl: 'We are a massive club but not a massive team' - Ruben Amorim reveals how Man Utd can improve
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has outlined what Manchester United must do to improve their performances.
